title: 東京大賞典の後に・地方の“テッペン”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One wins the Tokyo Daishoten, securing her
place at the top of the regional races. The crowd
roars with cheers of her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns to the audience and swears to conquer
the top of the centrals too and become
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the stands, Oguri Cap and Super Creek accept
these words as a personal challenge, their spirits
set ablaze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide our first senior year race will be the
spring Tenno Sho. It's time to take our fight to
the central G1s!
